code.name: FLUKA CERN
code.notes: Custom FLUKA source sampler and LET/dose user routine. Browser depth profiles exported from validated PRDOJTRACK_10x1M post-processed CSVs.

frame.to_patient: Depth profiles are exported on the shared isocenter-referenced Z_narrow depth grid in cm, increasing downstream along the beam.

capabilities.notes: Initial browser export includes validated 1D Z_narrow dose and fluence depth profiles for all particles, all protons, and primary protons. Relative-error column is present but set to zero because the current post-processed FLUKA CSV does not carry per-bin statistical uncertainties. DirtyDose is not included because its SHIELD-HIT definition is not yet repository-defined.

outputs.notes: Exported from FLUKA PRDOJTRACK_10x1M post-processed CSV. Values are MeV/g/primary.
Exported from FLUKA PRDOJTRACK_10x1M post-processed CSV. Values are 1/cm^2/primary.
